title: coelogyne quadriloba
intro: Coelogyne quadriloba, also known as the four-lobed coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne quadriloba include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
